title: Bontiful Crops
description: Bontiful Crops is a vanilla supplement pack focused on improving the farming experience in Minecraft.
body:
![Bontiful Crops logo by KodaConstellation.](https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/f175e25b-887b-403f-89d0-d802e23a5daf/dfsxl6z-51647602-ca2c-400b-b6e0-ffa7a00a70a6.png/v1/fill/w_1225,h_652,strp/logo_1_by_kodaconstellation_dfsxl6z-pre.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ktGbj2K2AQnk6ETFbpofm1l8xcMpqHSVGj0BDeeotno)
Graphic Design and Brand Logos by [KodaConstellation](https://twitter.com/KodaConstella)

## Bontiful Crops
Bontiful Crops is a resource pack with one simple goal, to make crops in Minecraft more interesting and intuitive! With this resource pack, crops experience an easily visible growth spurt when they become harvestable! With Bontiful Crops, you should never be unsure when you should harvest a crop!**

## Changes as of v2.2
- New models and textures for Beetroots, Carrots, Potatoes, Wheat, and Cocoa Beans
- New model and texture for Moist Farmland


## What's next?
- Sparkle Crops
- Crop roots
- New model and texture for Pumpkins and Melons

If you like my work, **you can follow me on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/8onfire.com)!** I'm the creator of #mcartday, as well as a Game Texture Artist, 3D Model Artist, 3D Animator, Gameplay Designer, and Content Creator in the Minecraft Space.

**Like this resource pack? You can donate me on [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/8onfire) to help support more projects like this!**
